phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cerâmica de Barcelos is kept
phrases.text_local: Onde estão expostas as peças de Cerâmica de Barcelos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN ehsh-POHSH-tuhsh UHSH PEH-suhsh DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH buh-ruh-SEH-loosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Barcelos roosters symbolize luck in Portugal; staff advise handling ceramics carefully per store policy.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, ficam na secção de cerâmica.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng NUH SEH-sown DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are in the ceramics section.

responses.english: Good morning, they are in the ceramics section.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng NUH SEH-sown DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, ficam na secção de cerâmica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift wrapping station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de embrulhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH aymb-ROO-lyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese shops often provide complimentary gift wrapping for traditional items, especially before holidays.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao empacotador na área de caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW aym-puh-koo-tuh-DOHR NUH AH-reeuh DIH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the gift wrapper at the checkout area.

responses.english: Ask the gift wrapper at the checkout area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW aym-puh-koo-tuh-DOHR NUH AH-reeuh DIH KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao empacotador na área de caixa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cerâmica de Barcelos is kept
phrases.text_local: Onde está a Cerâmica de Barcelos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH buh-ruh-SEH-loosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Cerâmica de Barcelos are traditional Portuguese ceramics; in this store, they are displayed upstairs with other home goods.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Cerâmica de Barcelos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH buh-ruh-SEH-loosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente no balcão central.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sales associate at the central checkout counter.

responses.english: Ask the sales associate at the central checkout counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte ao atendente no balcão central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift wrapping station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o serviço de embrulho para presente?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW seh-ruh-VEE-soo DIH aymb-ROO-lyoo PUH-ruh preh-ZAYNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese stores, gift wrapping is often done at the checkout counter, not a separate station.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar Cerâmica de Barcelos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH buh-ruh-SEH-loosh?

likely_response.local: A Cerâmica de Barcelos está disponível na loja. Pergunte a um atendente para ajudá-lo a localizar.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH buh-ruh-SEH-loosh ehs-TAH deesh-poo-NEE-vehl NUH LAW-zhuh. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih PUH-ruh uh-zhoo-DAH-LOO AH loo-kuh-lee-ZAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Cerâmica de Barcelos is available in the store. Ask a sales associate to help you locate it.

responses.english: Cerâmica de Barcelos is available in the store. Ask a sales associate to help you locate it.
responses.phonetic: AH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh DIH buh-ruh-SEH-loosh ehs-TAH deesh-poo-NEE-vehl NUH LAW-zhuh. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih PUH-ruh uh-zhoo-DAH-LOO AH loo-kuh-lee-ZAHR.
responses.french: A Cerâmica de Barcelos está disponível na loja. Pergunte a um atendente para ajudá-lo a localizar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cadernos da Gela are
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde estão os Cadernos da Gela?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH kuh-DEH-ruh-noosh DUH ZHEH-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese shops, 'ao fundo' means 'at the back' of the store. Pointing is common if the item is nearby.

likely_response.local: Na secção de papelaria, ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SEH-sown DIH puh-pih-luh-REEUH, OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the stationery section, at the back.

responses.english: In the stationery section, at the back.
responses.phonetic: NUH SEH-sown DIH puh-pih-luh-REEUH, OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.french: Na secção de papelaria, ao fundo.
